summary: Record the final bounded build and in-app browser smoke evidence for the C10/MCP contract slice.

decisions.decision: Use one local Vite session and the in-app browser to verify the initial Welcome surface, dismiss it, open the AI rail, and observe the exact unconfigured setup text; close the tab and stop the local server afterward.
decisions.rationale: This proves the rendered route and truthful no-network setup state without claiming provider-network or hosted clean-host acceptance.

testEvidence.criterion: The production client compiles and bundles after the slice.
testEvidence.test: Run one bounded production build, provenance check, and diff check.

red.outcome: RED: one unsupported aria-label on a paragraph was removed; no behavior defect was found.

green.command: pnpm.cmd build; pnpm.cmd check:provenance; git diff --check
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript and Vite build completed; provenance passed; diff check was clean.

testEvidence.criterion: The rendered web shell exposes truthful AI setup behavior.
testEvidence.test: Start Vite on 127.0.0.1:4173; use the in-app browser once to inspect Welcome, close it, open the unique Activity rail AI button, and check exact setup/guidance text counts; finalize the tab and stop the server.

red.outcome: RED: the first click was attempted while Welcome obscured the activity surface; the tab was re-observed, Welcome was closed, and the supported unique AI rail control was used.

green.outcome: GREEN: ScadMill loaded; Welcome rendered; after dismissal, the AI rail control resolved uniquely; setup and no-network guidance each resolved exactly once; tab finalized and local server stopped.

nearMisses.sought: Rendered browser smoke evidence without turning automatic tool screenshots into a product claim
nearMisses.confirmation: The browser metadata included an automatic screenshot with the action result; only the observed DOM counts and text are claimed.

questions: Hosted AI AC-10.c/d, viewer-screenshot context, persistence hydration/deletion, agent rounds, desktop MCP lifecycle, and clean-host evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
